com.scm.all.reportGridEnum

类 GREnums.QueryViewerEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.scm.all.reportGridEnum.GREnums.QueryViewerEvent
  • 封闭类:
    GREnums

    public static class GREnums.QueryViewerEvent
extends java.lang.Object
    查询显示器事件ID枚举

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static int BATCH_FETCH_RECORD
      BatchFetchRecord，此事件目前仅提供给WEB报表插件
      static int CHART_CLICK_LEGEND
      ChartClickLegend
      static int CHART_CLICK_SERIES
      ChartClickSeries
      static int CHART_DBL_CLICK_LEGEND
      ChartDblClickLegend
      static int CHART_DBL_CLICK_SERIES
      ChartDblClickSeries
      static int CLICK
      Click，为了和系统事件区分，尾部加"事件"二字
      static int CLOSE_BUTTON_CLICK
      CloseButtonClick
      static int COLUMN_LAYOUT_CHANGE
      ColumnLayoutChange，当列的显示宽度或顺序发生改变时触发
      static int CONTENT_CELL_CLICK
      ContentCellClick
      static int CONTENT_CELL_DBL_CLICK
      ContentCellDblClick
      static int CONTROL_CLICK
      ControlClick
      static int CONTROL_DBL_CLICK
      ControlDblClick
      static int CUSTOM_BUTTON_CLICK
      CustomButtonClick
      static int DBL_CLICK
      DblClick，为了和系统事件区分，尾部加"事件"二字
      static int KEY_DOWN
      KeyDown，为了和系统事件区分，尾部加"事件"二字
      static int KEY_PRESS
      KeyPress，为了和系统事件区分，尾部加"事件"二字
      static int KEY_UP
      KeyUp，为了和系统事件区分，尾部加"事件"二字
      static int MOUSE_DOWN
      MouseDown，在查询显示器上鼠标按钮按下时触发
      static int MOUSE_MOVE
      MouseMove
      static int MOUSE_UP
      MouseUp，在查询显示器上鼠标按钮按下再释放时触发
      static int SECTION_CLICK
      SectionClick
      static int SECTION_DBL_CLICK
      SectionDblClick
      static int SELECTION_CELL_CHANGE
      SelectionCellChange
      static int STATUS_CHANGE
      StatusChange，当控件的查看状态发生改变时触发本事件
      static int TITLE_CELL_CLICK
      TitleCellClick
      static int TITLE_CELL_DBL_CLICK
      TitleCellDblClick
      static int TOOLBAR_COMMAND_CLICK
      ToolbarCommandClick，5和6不会产生反馈事件

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      QueryViewerEvent()

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object
